attempt: Use the bounded-gap separation lemma as a filter: any proposed twin-prime rank or weight must measure exact gap 2 and fail on the deletion model.

bounded_result.frontier_test: Does the proposed statistic collapse when all exact gap-2 pairs are deleted?

obstruction: A positive bounded-gap statistic still does not force infinitely many exact gap-2 pairs.
candidate_theorem: An unconditional exact-gap-2 lower-bound functional remains positive at arbitrarily large scales and collapses under exact-gap deletion countermodels.
next_experiment: Search exact-gap-sensitive sieve features and reject any feature preserved by gap-2 deletion.
claim_boundary: No Twin Prime proof and no Twin Prime counterexample.
